news.quietMessage: News updates resume at {time} — rest well 🌙

common.tagline: Connecting those who need help with those who can help

landing.title: How can we help?
landing.subtitle: A simple way to connect people who need help with those who can provide it
landing.needHelpDesc: Request medicine, shelter, food, or other essential support
landing.offerHelpDesc: Browse open requests and offer your support
landing.safeNotice: Your privacy and safety are our priority. Personal information is protected.

request.title: Request Help
request.subtitle: Tell us what you need. We will share your request with helpers in your area.
request.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you need (e.g., insulin for diabetic patient, family of 5 needs shelter)
request.areaPlaceholder: Neighborhood or area (do not share exact address)

urgencyLevels.medium: Medium — can wait a day or two

request.phoneNote: Your phone number will not be shown publicly
request.name: Your name
request.consent: I understand this is a volunteer coordination tool, not an emergency service. I agree to share the above information with verified helpers.

success.title: Request submitted
success.subtitle: Your request has been received. Helpers in your area will be able to see it.
success.referenceNote: Save this code to check on your request later
success.step1: Your request will be reviewed and published shortly
success.step2: A helper may reach out to you using your preferred contact method
success.step3: If you selected no direct contact, an admin will coordinate

browse.subtitle: Browse requests from people who need help
browse.noRequests: No open requests match your filters
browse.noRequestsSubtitle: Try changing your filters or check back soon

matching.atCapacity: You have reached the maximum active claims
matching.atCapacityDesc: Complete or release some of your current claims to help more people

details.loginToHelp: Sign in or register to help

details.claimSuccess: Thank you! You've offered to help.
details.contactHidden: Contact details are shared only with verified helpers
details.awaitingConfirmation: Waiting for other party to confirm

helper.subtitle: Create an account to offer help and contact people in need
helper.name: Your name
helper.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your helper account
helper.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in.

contacts.title: Contact Directory
contacts.subtitle: People you can call or WhatsApp for help in your area
contacts.noContacts: No contacts available yet. Check back soon.

shelters.title: Approved Shelter Centers
shelters.subtitle: Find the nearest approved shelter center in your area.
shelters.pickArea: Choose your governorate to see nearby shelters
shelters.noResultsSearch: Try a different search or clear the filter
shelters.viewSheltersDesc: Find approved shelter locations across Lebanon
shelters.disclaimer: This platform identifies the locations of public schools and institutes being used as shelter centers for families displaced by the Israeli aggression. It aims to support coordination efforts among solidarity organizations by mapping shelter locations for those wishing to provide donations, based on the school list issued by the Ministerial Committee for Disaster Management dated September 27. The map will be updated regularly as information changes.
shelters.disclaimerSource: This platform is based on data published by the National Committee for Disaster and Crisis Response Coordination and the school directory issued by the Center for Educational Research and Development.

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.content: This platform collects minimal personal data to coordinate humanitarian assistance. Your information is shared only with verified helpers and administrators. Phone numbers are stored securely and never displayed publicly. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting an administrator. This service is provided on a volunteer basis with no guarantees.
privacy.protectItem1: Phone numbers are stored in a separate, access-controlled collection
privacy.protectItem2: Exact addresses are never collected or displayed
privacy.protectItem3: Public request listings show only general area information
privacy.protectItem4: Contact details are shared only with verified helpers and administrators
privacy.rightsItem1: Request deletion of your data at any time
privacy.rightsItem3: Choose your preferred contact method or opt out of direct contact

terms.title: Terms of Use & Humanitarian Notice
terms.content: This platform is a volunteer-operated humanitarian coordination tool. It is NOT an emergency service. If you are in immediate danger, contact local emergency services. By using this platform, you acknowledge that: (1) This is a best-effort volunteer service; (2) We cannot guarantee any specific response time or outcome; (3) Information shared is used solely for coordinating humanitarian assistance; (4) You will not misuse this platform for fraudulent requests or harmful purposes.
terms.emergencyWarning: This is NOT an emergency service. If you are in immediate danger, call your local emergency number.
terms.aboutContent: This platform is a volunteer-operated humanitarian coordination tool designed to connect displaced people with individuals and organizations who can provide assistance. It is not operated by any government or official agency.
terms.useItem1: Submit only genuine requests for help
terms.useItem2: Do not submit false or misleading information
terms.useItem3: Do not misuse the platform for commercial purposes
terms.useItem4: Treat all users with respect and dignity
terms.limitItem1: We cannot guarantee response times or outcomes
terms.limitItem2: Volunteer availability varies by area and time
terms.limitItem3: We are not responsible for the actions of individual helpers
terms.limitItem4: The platform may experience downtime during high-usage periods

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this page
errors.duplicateRequest: You recently submitted a similar request. Please wait before submitting again.

disclaimer.banner: This platform is in demo mode. All data shown is for demonstration purposes only.
disclaimer.notReady: Settings functionality is not ready yet. Changes are not saved.

actors.observedHint: You have personally seen their staff or volunteers at work
actors.coverageQuestion: Is their stated coverage area accurate?
actors.coverageHint: Their listed zones and sectors match what you have observed
actors.associateQuestion: Are you willing to publicly associate your organization with theirs?
actors.associateHint: Your name will appear in their vouch chain
actors.confirmAllQuestions: All three questions must be confirmed to vouch

outcomes.disclaimer: Not a reporting tool — shared for peer coordination. Data is self-reported by actors and not independently verified. Use for coordination awareness, not for formal assessment or evaluation.
